name: Stargazer Xayah
title: Stargazer Xayah
og_desc: Stargazers change constellations each game, having different effects for the trait. Some are better than others; here’s how to best play Xayah in Set 17.

name: Graves Fast 9
title: Graves Fast 9
og_desc: Graves is a unique champion with several frames that changes how he plays and many upgrades. Here’s the best board to play him in if you find him early.

name: Samira Reroll
title: Samira Reroll
og_desc: Samira Reroll takes advantage of Samira’s passive that deals damage on knockup with various knockup champions, keeping her in the Groove longer.

name: Mecha
title: Mecha
og_desc: The ultimate one unit comp. Do you enjoy an immortal tank? That’s the only goal of this line: Make the Mighty Mech (Galio) completely unkillable. Here’s how.

name: Viktor Bronze for Life
title: Viktor Bronze for Life
og_desc: This Viktor comp takes advantage of the fact that you can get many traits by pairing Illaoi and Mordekaiser together, making it strong with Bronze for Life.

name: Space Groove Nami
title: Space Groove Nami
og_desc: Space Groove brings back the Disco music! The trait is quite powerful and often works well with emblems since it plays many 2-breakpoint traits.

name: Meeple Corki
title: Meeple Corki
og_desc: Meeples are unique in that they have the ability to print units at 7 Meeple, which you can use temporarily before dropping down to 5 or even 3 Meeple late game.

name: N.O.V.A
title: N.O.V.A
og_desc: N.O.V.A. is one of the strongest utility traits ever made for TFT. Teamwide shred, sunder, crit, attack speed, etc. Here’s how to best play the units together.

name: Kai’Sa Rogues
title: Kai’Sa Rogues
og_desc: Kai’Sa and Fizz have strong crossover and are able to activate many traits with Rhaast. This comp will get updated if any other variations pop up as well.

name: Primordian Reroll
title: Primordian Reroll
og_desc: Primordian is one of the main reroll traits for Set 17. It helps you hit your 3-stars by providing you units each round. Here’s how to play the reroll line.

name: Bonk! Nasus
title: Bonk! Nasus
og_desc: Bonk! It’s a simple hero augment: Nasus now bonks. And he bonks hard. Here’s what units to play and how to itemize to ensure he keeps bonking.

name: Shepherd LeBlanc
title: Shepherd LeBlanc
og_desc: Shepherd LeBlanc summons “The Bond of the Stars” and with a Shepherd Emblem + Sona, can summon the strongest form of Bia & Bayin. Here’s how to play the line.

name: Vanguard LeBlanc
title: Vanguard LeBlanc
og_desc: This comp’s strength will often vary depending on your Arbiter. The balance will change throughout the set, but this page will always be updated.

name: Vex AP Fast 9
title: Vex AP Fast 9
og_desc: Vex is an auto attack hypercarry that is often the pinnacle of AP comps. This is a board you should aim to transition into from a fast 9 spot.

name: Anima Diana Reroll
title: Anima Diana Reroll
og_desc: Anima is the loss streak trait for Set 17. Aim for big cashouts, itemize your Anima units with items from your cashout, and winout. Or go 8th trying.

name: The Big Bang Meepsie
title: The Big Bang Meepsie
og_desc: The Big Bang is Meepsie’s hero augment that causes him to slam into the board. Itemize him as an AP melee carry and watch him clear the board each fight.

name: Twisted Fate Reroll
title: Twisted Fate Reroll
og_desc: Twisted Fate Reroll goes for many different 1-costs, often with The Medallion constellation and 1-cost combat augments. Here’s how to play the line.

name: Termeepnal Velocity Poppy
title: Termeepnal Velocity Poppy
og_desc: Termeepnal Velocity is Poppy’s hero augment that changes her into a ranged carry. 7 Meeple can be used to print her at 3 star, allowing you to skip rerolling.

name: Cho’Gath Reroll
title: Cho’Gath Reroll
og_desc: Cho’Gath is back and bigger than ever. The optimal way to play Cho’Gath will likely evolve over the course of the set, so check here to see the latest tech.

name: Stellar Combo Aatrox
title: Stellar Combo Aatrox
og_desc: Stellar Combo is Aatrox’s hero augment that turns his ability into his League chain slam ability. There are many variations that are viable. Here’s all of them.

name: Conduit MF Viktor
title: Conduit MF Viktor
og_desc: Miss Fortune can turn into a Conduit and pair with Viktor for a strong reroll line. Its viability depends on Psionic item balance, so check here for latest.

name: Contract Killer Pyke
title: Contract Killer Pyke
og_desc: Contract Killer is the hero augment for Pyke that turns his ability into his League ultimate, resetting on kills and farming gold. Here’s how to play it.

name: Reach for the Stars Jax
title: Reach for the Stars Jax
og_desc: Reach for the Stars is Jax’s hero augment. The best constellations will change with balance, but this guide will stay updated with them throughout the set.
